description: Get ready to take relaxed style to the next level with the Camaro slip-on loafers from skechers. These shoes are great for casual outings and look great when teamed with jeans and tees or shirts for a cool laidback look.UpperOiled leather upper with soft suede and leather overlays for comfort and styleStitch detailing for greater styleEmbossed brand logo on the side of heelPerforations on the toe box for breathabilityElasticated sides for easy insertion and removal of the feetCushioned collar and tongue for greater comfortTextile and leather shoe liningMidsoleRelax Step cushioned comfort insole for step-in comfortShock absorbing midsole for greater cushioing of the feetOutsoleHigh traction outsole with TPR lugsshoe careUse a dry brush to dust off the dirtUse a branded leather polish
